mapper.select: SELECT id AS cartItemId, user_id AS userId, sku_id AS skuId, quantity AS quantity, checked AS checked, create_time AS createTime, update_time AS updateTime FROM tb_cart_item WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY update_time DESC, id DESC

SELECT id AS cartItemId, user_id AS userId, sku_id AS skuId, quantity AS quantity, checked AS checked, create_time AS createTime, update_time AS updateTime FROM tb_cart_item WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND sku_id = #{skuId} LIMIT 1

SELECT id AS cartItemId, user_id AS userId, sku_id AS skuId, quantity AS quantity, checked AS checked, create_time AS createTime, update_time AS updateTime FROM tb_cart_item WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND checked = 1 ORDER BY update_time DESC, id DESC
